MOTION To Compel Depositions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Dipanwita Deb Amar, for Defendant/Moving party George Zatulovsky
Michael Burns/Jonathan D. Martin, for Plaintiff/Opposing party Transnational Financial Network, Inc.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants George Zatulovsky, Preferred Financial Group, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Depositions is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear on dates to be agreed upon by counsel and completed within 20 days of notice of this order. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear for deposition was without substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $2,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION To Compel Depositions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-23-2006 Continued To Jul-18-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Set For Trial On Nov-06-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-18-06 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 501
